caption: A man with short, dark hair and facial stubble is recorded in a studio against a background of dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. He wears over-ear black headphones and a black zip-up jacket over a grey shirt. Positioned directly in front of him is a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking into the microphone. His expressions shift from a neutral, focused gaze in the first frame to a wide-eyed, surprised look with an open mouth in the second. In the third frame, he appears startled with wide eyes, and by the fourth frame, his eyes are partially closed as he continues to speak, gesturing with his hand slightly off-screen to the right. The camera remains static, focusing on his head and shoulders as his facial expressions evolve.
